traits.locale_text:
The user's armour cannot be more than {ruip|Armou|e868dbb0274243ccb24e8402397ee2ff}%, and their deflection cannot be more than {unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus}.
If the user has {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, they additionally suffer −50% Toughness.
